name: Bunch O Balloons Tropical Party (6 Pack) by ZURU, 200+ Rapid-Filling Self-Sealing Tropical Colored Water Balloons for Outdoor Family, Friends, Children Summer Fun (6 Pack)
bullets: Quick Fill: Splash into Summer with Bunch O Balloons. Fill and Tie 100 balloons in 60 seconds to start a Tropical Party in minutes! Simply attach the stem to a hose and make hundreds of water balloons in seconds.
No More Tying: Bunch O Balloons patented O-ring technology means there is no tying necessary. These innovative water balloons self-seal, leaving you more time to play!
Tropical Party: Get ready to party, with new Tropical Party colors!
Sustainability: Bunch O Balloons stems and caps are now made from certified and traceable, recycled plastic. Join us in unleashing a more sustainable summer.
6 x Bunch O Balloons Tropical Party Stems (total 200+ Self Sealing Water Balloons)
description: Get ready to party, with Bunch O Balloons Tropical Party Water Balloons! Fill and Tie 100 Tropical Party balloons in less than 60 seconds with these self-tying water balloons! With innovative O-ring technology and rapid fill capabilities, say goodbye to the stress and mess of filling individual water balloons and say hello to never ending splash out loud fun! Simply connect to a tap or hose, fill, and make hundreds of water balloons with no hand-tying. Take them to a pool party, to your backyard, to a barbecue, or any summer occasion to unleash summer fun no matter where you are! This pack inc

reviews.name: Amy L Cooper
reviews.title: Perfect for field day at school!
reviews.body: We needed to bring in 100 filled water balloons for field day at my kids school. We filled these up at 6:30 in the morning. They worked great. They all fit in one large laundry basket and it was much easier than filling them individually and having to tie them. Cost was about $15 for the 200 balloons so about $7.50 for the 100 but it was worth it. One balloon out of 99 had a very small hole in…

reviews.name: a_bennett
reviews.title: Great gift for kids
reviews.body: These are our go-to brand for water balloons. They work great and they don't ever pop when you are filling them up like other ones we have tried in the past. They are super easy to fill and they make a great affordable gift that any kid would love. The adults also get into it. The only thing I don't like is that they are not biodegradable and obviously picking up all the pieces is a hassle, but…

reviews.name: Isabella
reviews.title: Good product
reviews.body: My child loved these at his pool party / birthday party. Definitely fun for the kids. Some do pop easy when filling but they will fill to a decent size, not all maybe 4/10 will pop in a bundle so the thickness is okay. Also very easy to assemble just hooked it to my hose.

reviews.name: Denise Dutil
reviews.title: Fun, Easy Water Play for Parties
reviews.body: I use these for my kids’ outdoor party business and they’re very convenient. They inflate quickly, are easy to handle, and pack neatly in a bucket for transport. Great for keeping kids and families entertained at events.
